transcript: One kingdom, five heroes, each with a unique power, fighting, not just to survive, but to reign supreme over the savage kingdom. We'll be right back. RULE OF THE KINGDOM IS RESERVED FOR THE STRONG. Queen of the Great Marsh, Keeper of the Marsh Pride, Matsumi. Slaying giants is her speciality. Proof of absolute power. Get this wrong and you're dead. It takes brute strength and iron will. The Marsh Pride's power is unrivaled. Their place on the throne is secure... for now. This hard-won fortune feeds the next generation. Matsumi is growing her army. Empires are held by soldiers. Size and numbers matter. But leadership is everything no monarchy is immortal. Enemies gather on all sides and prepare for war. A lion's power is brawn, a hyena's brains. Zalika, the hyena queen, has her own plans for the marsh. She misses nothing. Knows everyone's strengths and weakness, and what she can take from them. Steal your courage, Seleka. Grow strong on the lion's leftovers. Just don't get caught. It takes more than threats for Zalika to back down. It takes more than just lions to keep Zalika at bay. It takes the king. Sekakama. The Hyena Slayer. He does not bluff. If she just snaps, spine. But Zalika can wait. They all die in the end patience is rewarded with a second-hand feast to fuel her growing army. One step closer to her master plan soon zalika you will have the numbers soon there will be war The Great Marsh is the beating heart of the kingdom. Control this, and you control everything. The Marsh Pride governs with terror. But rivals watch from every border. To the north, along the river, another queen rules over a lawless forest. Satao is building her own army here in the hills to wreak her revenge on matsumi Secondama was once her king. He left her for Matsumi. And together, they built the Marsh Pride. but Satao holds on to her ambitions. Your power, Satao, is your resilience. Thank you. so many mouths to feed they need this buffalo but for this young pride killing a giant is not so easy. The young lions have much to learn, and Satao has work to do. The pride youngsters pack muscle, but not experience. Only accomplished killers rule this kingdom. of Sitao's sons steps up. Another failed attempt, not a good time for an unexpected visitor. Zekakama is back. Bad news for the six princes. The king does not tolerate rivals. Bad news for the Six Princes. The King does not tolerate rivals, even if they are his sons. Will it be exile, or will it be death? Satao's sons are forced to flee. Two-thirds of your pride, gone. But you will never stop fighting, Sata. There are some that rule in the sun's full glare. challenge from the shadows. Saba, an elegant assassin her power is stealth invisibility Nothing is beyond your reach. Surgical and efficient. She's usually untouchable. But she now has a secret that makes her vulnerable. A bloodline, a future. Can you keep them safe, Saba? In a kingdom full of danger? A band of ruffians approaches, wild dogs. They torment and kill anyone in their path. Even a leopard king must leap for his life. Frustrated, the dogs turn their sights on Leopard Rock. Sabah's cubs will never meet a more terrible foe. Keep very still. Any move could be your last. Save. Safe, for the moment. But she must teach them to be invisible, to learn her special powers. There is no such thing as safety in this kingdom. dogs on the run. The pack refugees from beyond small but fiercely loyal their power comes from the pack But these challengers to the throne are trespassers now on the Marslion's domain. Do not get caught. Lions show dogs no mercy. Led well, six dogs can grow into a dynasty. Loyal alphas, Timana and Malau carry this dream. You must find a safe den soon, Timana. She is nearly due. The next generation decides the pack's future they alone unlock the gates of the kingdom We'll be right back. Motherhood is stressful, especially for the solitary assassin. Saba must leave her cubs alone while she kills. The longer she takes, the worse their odds. Storbritannia Get back a moment too late and nightmares might come true. Thanks for watching! Innocence offers no protection in this kingdom. Nothing can be done. Saba's daughter is gone. Her legacy, cut in half. Now, more than ever, she must protect her son, or all is lost. Satao, queen of the north. Abandoned by all your males. Your sons exiled, your king with another, but Satao will fight for her pride of three until her last breath. Proud hunter turns thief. Trouble never comes alone. Zalika is preparing for war. The Hyena Queen knows Satao has no protection. Malika is patient, persistent, cunning. Every move, a calculated risk. We risk a calculated move. With just one cub left, Saba is still in the great game. One less mouth to feed, but no room for error. The daily dilemma. Stay and starve together, or leave him alone, helpless. Saba, you have no choice. A cousin for her kitten. A momentary breath until tomorrow when she'll do it all again the daily grind of life in the kingdom kill feed sleep repeat the dry season changes the rules many will die some will rise in the chaos others will even thrive The sounds of death attract unhealthy attention. Half blind, a lone lioness struggles to find food. The marsh is dwindling riches are her last chance. Enough of playing nice. Sekikama is the enforcer. He lets her live. Beaten and banished, she is more desperate than ever. Thank you. Puppies in a den are sitting targets. It's time for them to learn to run. They're not up to speed yet, but killers won't mind. A hungry and beaten nomad is grateful for whatever comes its way. I'll see you next time. The unbeaten nomad is grateful for whatever comes its way. A life-saving meal for one could be a short life over. For one to rise, another must fall. The best way to take down a dynasty is to kill their young One less soldier. One less heir. As the dry season continues to punish the land the great exodus begins the herds move north in search of water. The fortunes of the marsh, gone. Matsumi has no choice but to follow the herds, but to walk alone is to court danger. Two nomadic males breach the kingdom, outcasts ready to test the current order. Now, they will command this queen, Matsumi. Submit or die. For Satao and the Northern Pride, patience pays off. The great herds come to them. I don't know. Storbritannia Finally, a chance for Satao's small pride to grow in strength. They are still in the game. A clever hyena queen feeds on chaos. Zalika takes everything she can. We'll see you next time. grow strong build your empire on the suffering of others Demana and Malar, you have lost half your young family. Protect the remaining three pups with your lives. the pale pack faces It's moving. The Pale Pack faces its most lethal challenge. Zalika's army is ready for combat. The lives of the pups is a cause to die for. We'll be right back. No! Fortune favors courageous parents United the pale pack is victorious. Mika lost a battle, not the war. She has not given up. to the marsh pride when the king and queen are away it's time to strike Let's try. It is done. The lions are routed. But this war will never end. Battle lines are always in motion. On the front line of famine, the young fall first. Saba's daily struggle has no end in sight. But salvation lurks in the mud. Sava's genius is that she alone sees it. While others starve Saba's ingenuity Keeps her In the game. Only a fool comes between a queen and her pride. Matsumi's king is coming. Storbritannia the nomads are banished Thank you for watching. The nomads are banished, lucky to be alive. Zekakama is king. Killer. Sekakama is king, killer, hero. The Marsh Pride is united again. As long as they can stay together, they are unbeatable. But in this harsh land, no one can rest easy. Deadly rivals will always haunt the shadows. Waiting to claim their share of the savage kingdom.
